info.title: Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.NuGetValidateSkylineSpecifications
info.description: Validates all projects that create Skyline NuGets against Skyline specifications for public libraries.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: For all projects creating a NuGet in the specified workspace, verifies if all project metadata is present and adheres to the requirements for public libraries published by Skyline Communications.

options.name: --minimal
options.description: When set, performs only basic NuGet package validation without Skyline-specific requirements. [default: False]
